title: Tigawa Temple
tagline: Tigawa Temple — spiritual town of Madhya Pradesh

overview.short: Tigawa is a village in Indian state of Madhya Pradesh and an archaeological site with a complex of about 36 Hindu temple ruins.
overview.description: Tigawa is a village in Indian state of Madhya Pradesh and an archaeological site with a complex of about 36 Hindu temple ruins. Of these, the small but important and ancient Kankali Devi Temple is in good condition, and is usually dated to about 400-425 CE. Unless another building is mentioned, references to "the temple" below refer to this. Also referred to as Tigowa or Tigwan, the site is about 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) north of Bahuriband between Katni and Jabalpur. The Hindu temple ruins were badly damaged during a colonial-era railway project when a contractor demolished and excavated the rui

topPlaces.name: Bahoriband
topPlaces.description: Bahoriband is a tehsil and gram panchayat in Katni district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. The headquarters is located in Bahoriband.

topPlaces.name: Bahuriband
topPlaces.description: Bahuriband (or Bahoriband), near Katni in Madhya Pradesh, is a famous inscription at the feet of a colossal stone image of Jain Tirthankara Shantinath. The colossal statue is 12 ft 2 in (3.71 m) in height.

items.note: Bahoriband is a tehsil and gram panchayat in Katni district in the Indian state of Madhya Pradesh. The headquarters is located in Bahoriband.

Bahuriband (or Bahoriband), near Katni in Madhya Pradesh, is a famous inscription at the feet of a colossal stone image of Jain Tirthankara Shantinath. The colossal statue is 12 ft 2 in (3.71 m) in height.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tigawa Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tigawa Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tigawa Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jabalpur Airport (57 km) and the nearest railway station is Katni Junction (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tigawa Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tigawa Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tigawa Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tigawa Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tigawa Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bahoriband, Bahuriband.
